case_title: ANDREW M RANACIS VS. JOSEPH R STONE III

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,619.00 FILED BY RANACIS, ANDREW M AS TO DEFENDANT STONE III, JOSEPH R ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANACIS, ANDREW M IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STONE III, JOSEPH R DEFENDANT INCLUDED HIS DEBT TO PLAINTIFF OF $2,619.00 IN HIS BANKRUPTCY PETITION AND THE DEBT WAS DISCHARGED. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-05-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORTS AS FOLLOWS: SEPTEMBER 5, 2012, DECEMBER 5, 2012 AND MARCH 5, 2013 FOR DISMISSAL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-07-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $59.00 - *(SUBSTITUTE SERVICE/DATE OF MAILING: JAN-17-2012)* SERVED JAN-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STONE III, JOSEPH R

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2012 - JUDGMENT.
